creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am getting the following messages when opening a PDF file from a command line in lumina-pdf:

Loading Locale: "l-pdf" "en_GB" "UTF-8"
 - Could not load Locale: "en_GB"
Could not find icon: "unknown" ""
Could not find icon: "application-pdf" "unknown"
Could not find icon: "document-print" ""
Could not find icon: "window-close" ""
Could not find icon: "transform-scale" ""
Could not find icon: "zoom-fit-best" ""
Could not find icon: "document-open" ""
Could not find icon: "format-view-agenda" ""
Could not find icon: "format-view-grid-small" ""
Could not find icon: "format-view-grid-large" ""

I do not use the Lumina desktop. lumina-pdf version is 1.4.1.
